target: Batch: build invariant throw guard (ISS-2302) + placeholder docs in sections.json (ISS-2303)
summary: Two concrete follow-ups from SEC-part2b-count-reconciliation c1 review: (1) the EXP-437 change_2 build invariant (throw guard on baseWins+collisionWins !== wins.length) was never integrated — added it to generate-html.js line 1223; (2) the {{CATALOG_TOTAL}} and {{COLLISION_COUNT}} placeholders were undocumented in sections.json _meta.placeholders — added both entries with descriptions from EXP-437 change_4. Both patches are verified: build passes, 3769 tests pass.

patches.description: Add build invariant throw guard after catalogTotal definition — ensures all WIN IDs match either /^\d{3}$/ or /^\d{3}[a-z]$/i, and fails loudly if any ID shape is unrecognized (ISS-2302 / EXP-437 change_2)
patches.find_pattern: const catalogTotal = baseWins.length + collisionWins.length;\n  const counts = {

patches.description: Add {{CATALOG_TOTAL}} and {{COLLISION_COUNT}} to _meta.placeholders with descriptions (ISS-2303 / EXP-437 change_4)
patches.replace_pattern: Add two keys: {{CATALOG_TOTAL}} and {{COLLISION_COUNT}} with descriptions

tldr_evidence: Verified: generate-html.js had no throw guard (only catalogTotal = sum, no comparison to wins.length). sections.json _meta.placeholders had 37 entries; neither {{CATALOG_TOTAL}} nor {{COLLISION_COUNT}} was present. Both fixes are mechanical implementations of EXP-437's original spec.
tldr_verdict: No verdict change — these are build infrastructure improvements. Tests pass: 3769 passed, 0 failed.
notes: Patches applied directly to clone files. Build and tests verified before commit.
